activities_projects.title: Character Analysis of Surang
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the behaviour and personality of the main character
steps: Read the chapter 'The Tunnel' carefully
Identify the main character Surang and his actions in the story
Write at least five qualities that describe Surang
Support each quality with a situation from the story
Present your analysis to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical skills by examining character behaviour
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of traits and examples from the text (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Exploring the Theme
activities_projects.objective: Understand the deeper message of the story
steps: Form small discussion groups
Discuss what the tunnel symbolises in the story
Identify themes such as curiosity, courage, or discovery
Write a short paragraph explaining the theme
Share your ideas with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to interpret symbolic meanings in literature
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of interpretation and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Story Mapping Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the structure of the narrative
steps: Divide the story into five parts: introduction, rising action, climax, falling action, and conclusion
Create a story map on chart paper
Write the important events in each part
Decorate the chart and present it in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the structure of narrative writing
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and completeness of the story map (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Reconstruction
activities_projects.objective: Improve understanding of dialogue and character interaction
steps: Identify an important moment in the story
Rewrite the scene as a dialogue between the characters
Add expressions and emotions in the conversation
Read your dialogue aloud in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop writing and communication skills through dialogue creation
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and relevance to the story (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role Play: Inside the Tunnel
activities_projects.objective: Develop speaking confidence and dramatic expression
steps: Form groups of 4–5 students
Select a key scene from the story
Assign roles to group members
Practice the scene with expressions and gestures
Perform the role play in front of the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve teamwork, confidence, and speaking skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Expression, teamwork, and understanding of the scene (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Exploration
steps: List at least ten unfamiliar words from the story
Find their meanings using a dictionary
Write a synonym or antonym for each word
Use each word in a meaningful sentence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and language usage
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence construction (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Descriptive Passage Writing
steps: Imagine walking through the tunnel described in the story
Write a descriptive paragraph about what you see, hear, and feel
Use descriptive words and sensory details
Read your paragraph to your classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop creativity and descriptive language skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Use of sensory details and clarity of description (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Word Formation Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand prefixes and suffixes used in English
steps: Find words in the story that contain prefixes or suffixes
Write the root word and the added prefix or suffix
Explain how the meaning changes
Create two new words using the same prefix or suffix
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand word formation and vocabulary building

activities_projects.title: Grammar Activity: Complex Sentences
steps: Identify complex sentences in the chapter
Underline the main clause and subordinate clause
Write three new complex sentences related to the story
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn sentence structure and grammar usage
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct sentence formation and clause identification (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Alternate Ending Writing
steps: Think about how the story ends
Imagine a different ending for the story
Write a short narrative describing your alternate ending
Share your story with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop creativity and storytelling ability
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, coherence, and grammar in writing (10 marks)
